name: majiang
description: HTML5 + JavaScript で動作する麻雀アプリ「電脳麻将」

scripts.build:assets: mkdir -p dist/mediapipe/wasm dist/avatar && cp -f node_modules/@mediapipe/tasks-vision/wasm/* dist/mediapipe/wasm/ && ([ -f dist/mediapipe/face_landmarker.task ] || curl -fsSL -o dist/mediapipe/face_landmarker.task https://storage.googleapis.com/mediapipe-models/face_landmarker/face_landmarker/float16/1/face_landmarker.task) && ([ -f dist/avatar/default.vrm ] || curl -fsSL -o dist/avatar/default.vrm https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pixiv/three-vrm/dev/packages/three-vrm/examples/models/VRM1_Constraint_Twist_Sample.vrm)
scripts.build: npm run build:assets && npm run build:html && npm run build:css && npm run build:js
scripts.release: npm run build:assets && npm run build:html && npm run build:css && webpack --mode production

author: Satoshi Kobayashi (https://github.com/kobalab)
